title: Battle of Borleias (disambiguation)
content:
There have been at least seven battles at the planet of [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] in galactic history.

'''[[Fifth Alsakan Conflict]]'''
:*[[Battle of the Pyria system]]

'''[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]'''
:*[[First Battle of Borleias]], in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].
:*[[Second Battle of Borleias]], in 6 ABY.
:*[[Skirmish near Borleias]], in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].
:*[[Battle of Borleias (10 ABY)|Battle of Borleias]], in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].

'''[[Yuuzhan Vong War]]'''
:*[[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; First)|First Battle of Borleias]], in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].
:*[[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|Second Battle of Borleias]], in 27.5 ABY.

In addition, there was [[Battle of Borleias (holodocumentary)|a holodocumentary]] about the Second Battle during the Yuuzhan Vong War.
